intake.risk_posture: Preserve current /builder-v2 click assignment behavior and all /builder behavior; use V1 DnD as behavior reference, not code-shape authority; prefer typed contracts and characterization before wiring dnd-kit.
intake.harness_policy: Goal packet and focused tests allowed; Browser/manual checks required for visual DnD slices; no AGENTS.md, lint, dependency, remote, docs/design, or plugin-skill changes without routed maintenance and explicit approval.
allowed_areas: read-only V1 builder DnD references under src/features/builder/**
narrowly related shared builder helpers/types only when selected by Judge
protected_areas: speculative DnD abstractions without a selected payload/preview/drop contract
validation_commands: targeted npx eslint over touched files
Browser/manual checks for desktop/adaptive DnD visual slices
intake.stop_condition: Stop when the active tranche lands and is verified, a product/design decision is needed, verification fails twice on the same blocker, same-concept expansion crosses protected scope, or work drifts into mobile redesign, teams-list shape, dependency churn, remote state, or V1 rewrites.

focus_areas.name: V1 DnD behavior parity
focus_areas.evidence: S1 scouts mapped V1 DndContext/useBuilderDnd/createBuilderDndCoordinator, DragData, dnd-ids, predicted hover, transfer actions, quick-lineup behavior, and DnD tests.
focus_areas.next: Queue characterization/parity tests before behavior-heavy V2 routing.

focus_areas.name: V2 drag payload and drop target contract
focus_areas.evidence: Builder V2 has no dnd-kit integration yet. Slot and picker DTOs contain enough IDs/assets/status for DnD but are render-focused.
focus_areas.next: First recommended Worker slice is D1 V2-owned payload, preview descriptor, and drop target descriptor module/tests.

focus_areas.name: Drag preview and ghost architecture
focus_areas.evidence: V1 has separate picker ghosts, team card ghosts, team wheel ghosts, and team preview ghosts; user explicitly wants to avoid this sprawl.
focus_areas.next: Queue one preview descriptor/overlay contract before visual ghost implementation.

focus_areas.name: DnD event routing and model commands
focus_areas.evidence: V2 assignment commands handle picker assignment but not active-team slot/wheel/covenant drag moves/removal as first-class model APIs.
focus_areas.next: Queue command characterization/expansion before team-origin drags.

focus_areas.name: CSS overlay clipping boundary
focus_areas.evidence: Architecture C13 and scouts found V2 panels, slot cards, art masks, picker results, and adaptive drawer can clip drag ghosts unless an overlay portals above them.
focus_areas.next: Queue after a concrete overlay DOM exists; do not guess CSS without a ghost surface.

focus_areas.name: Desktop/adaptive pointer behavior
focus_areas.evidence: V2 desktop uses side picker; adaptive uses drawer picker. Scouts recommend pointer/manual checks on both surfaces.
focus_areas.next: Validate every DnD worker slice on desktop/adaptive once browser wiring exists.

focus_areas.name: A11y and keyboard DnD
focus_areas.evidence: V1 uses PointerSensor only; V2 click assignment remains the current non-pointer fallback.
focus_areas.next: Queue explicit a11y decision: KeyboardSensor now, or documented non-pointer alternatives plus future candidate.

candidates.title: V2 drag payload preview and drop target descriptor contract
candidates.evidence: Current BuilderV2SlotView and picker options are render DTOs. V1 DragData is a useful behavior reference but should not be copied with V1 ghost coupling.
candidates.next: Implemented by W1 in `src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.ts` with focused tests. No dnd-kit wiring yet.

candidates.title: V2 DnD id helpers and drop target parsing
candidates.evidence: V1 uses plain slot IDs plus prefixed wheel/covenant/picker/team-preview IDs. V2 needs stable IDs without leaking V1 preview/team-row concerns.
candidates.next: Implemented by W1 in `src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.ts` with focused id round-trip and rejection tests.

candidates.title: V1 parity characterization for DnD routing
concept_blast_radius: new V2 pure routing tests once helpers exist
candidates.evidence: V1 behavior includes picker-to-card fallback, socket-specific wheels/covenants, remove-to-picker, transfer dialogs, and quick-lineup advancement.
candidates.next: W2 implemented the first pure routing characterization in `builder-v2-dnd.test.ts`. Command-level characterization for transfer dialogs remains covered by existing V2 page tests and can be expanded when D6 reaches team-origin moves.

candidates.title: Picker draggable source wiring
candidates.evidence: Picker tiles render all draggable source candidates and already preserve click assignment.
candidates.next: Implemented by W3 for picker-origin draggables while preserving click assignment.

candidates.title: Active slot wheel covenant target and source wiring
candidates.evidence: Team slots render card, wheel, and covenant interaction surfaces but have no stable drag/drop descriptors.
candidates.next: Implemented by W3 for active slot/wheel/covenant/posse droppable targets; W4/W6 completed team-origin drag sources, move/remove execution, and hover/remove feedback.

candidates.title: Builder V2 DnD event coordinator and model command expansion
candidates.evidence: V2 has picker assignment commands, but team-origin slot/wheel/covenant moves and remove-to-picker need explicit command paths.
candidates.next: W4 implemented team-origin awakeners/wheels/covenants as drag sources plus remove/move command dispatch through model boundaries.

candidates.title: Single Builder V2 drag overlay and ghost descriptor renderer
candidates.evidence: V1 ghost system is visually useful but data-model messy. User wants one clean preview path.
candidates.next: W5 implemented one descriptor-driven Builder V2 drag overlay consuming `BuilderV2DragPreviewDescriptor`; no V1 ghost components were copied.

candidates.title: Overlay clipping z-index CSS boundary
candidates.evidence: V2 slot cards, art masks, picker results, and adaptive drawer use clipping and fixed layers.
candidates.next: W5 added overlay CSS above the adaptive picker backdrop and fixed empty team-source draggable attributes; full manual drag visual confirmation remains useful because Playwright drag automation did not exercise dnd-kit.

candidates.title: Remove-intent and predicted hover feedback
candidates.evidence: V1 remove-intent and predicted wheel/covenant hover prevent ambiguous drops.
candidates.next: W6 implemented picker remove-target styling, direct slot/wheel/covenant drop-target styling, pointer-first collision, and V1-style card-level wheel/covenant fallback drops.

candidates.title: Keyboard and a11y DnD decision and fallback
candidates.evidence: V1 uses PointerSensor only; V2 must avoid pretending pointer DnD is fully keyboard-accessible.
candidates.next: J2 selected click-first fallback policy now: pointer DnD is progressive enhancement; existing buttons remain the required non-pointer path. KeyboardSensor is deferred until a separate keyboard drag design exists.

candidates.title: Team row/team list DnD
candidates.reason: User has not settled teams-list/card shape and the current DnD request is for core builder loadout interactions, not teams-list reordering or presentation.
candidates.evidence: User has not settled teams-list/card shape; current request focuses core builder DnD.
candidates.next: Out of scope until teams section shape is selected.

candidates.title: Mobile DnD
candidates.reason: User previously asked to leave mobile for later; current DnD validation targets desktop and adaptive/tablet surfaces only.
candidates.evidence: User previously asked to leave mobile for later; current DnD validation targets desktop/adaptive.
candidates.next: Out of scope until explicitly selected.

candidates.title: Whole-slot awakener and loadout swap
candidates.source_task: User reported V2 could swap contents indirectly but not drag A3 onto A1 as one slot payload.
candidates.evidence: V1 supports team-slot to team-slot drops through `swapSlotAssignments`; V2 only removed team awakeners or ignored non-picker team-awakener drops.
candidates.next: Implemented with `move-awakener` action and explicit model command over `swapSlotAssignments`.

candidates.title: Picker remove drop zone
candidates.source_task: User could not drag anything to the picker to remove it.
candidates.evidence: V2 had `makeBuilderV2PickerDndId()` and remove actions, but no picker surface registered `useDroppable` with that id.
candidates.next: Implemented by registering picker results as the picker drop target and adding remove-target styling.

candidates.title: Pointer-first target correctness
candidates.source_task: User reported dropping while cursor was over one card could affect another card.
candidates.evidence: Default collision behavior can select by rectangle/center rather than the visible cursor position in dense card grids.
candidates.next: Implemented `pointerWithin` with `closestCenter` fallback and wired it into desktop/adaptive DndContext.

candidates.title: V1-aligned compact ghost polish
candidates.source_task: User screenshots showed V1 ghosts were visually tighter and clearer than V2 ghosts.
candidates.evidence: V2 overlay was larger and slabby compared with V1's compact art/text drag ghosts.
candidates.next: W7 refined this further: item drags are art-only with picker chrome, while whole-slot drags use a compact full-art slot-card ghost through a descriptor `variant`.

candidates.title: Predicted effective drop hover
candidates.source_task: User requested V1-style predicted hovers for card-level wheel/covenant drops.
candidates.evidence: Literal hover could light a card, wheel, or covenant surface that was not the effective target. Broad wheel drops also needed the product rule that filled cards should not guess a replacement socket.
candidates.next: W8 implemented `resolveBuilderV2EffectiveDropTarget` shared by hover and final drop routing: broad wheel drops fill first empty wheel sockets only, full-card wheel drops no-op unless over W1/W2, and covenant drops highlight the owning covenant slot.

maintenance.title: DnD accessibility policy
maintenance.trigger: V1 PointerSensor-only behavior and V2 future DnD
maintenance.next: After first DnD wiring, decide whether to encode a local accessibility note or test pattern.

maintenance.title: Drag preview descriptor pattern
maintenance.trigger: User explicitly wants to avoid ghost/object sprawl
maintenance.next: Consider after D7 if the descriptor pattern should be recorded for future builder surfaces.

tasks.title: Map Builder V2 DnD candidates
tasks.expected_output: V1 DnD parity map, V2 insertion points, payload/preview/drop target recommendations, validation ideas, and candidate slices.

evidence: Three read-only scout agents completed: V1 DnD behavior/ghost audit, V2 insertion point/C8-C13 audit, and dnd-kit/test/a11y audit.
Scouts found Builder V2 currently has no DndContext/useDraggable/useDroppable/useSortable implementation.
Scouts agreed the first clean move is a V2-owned drag payload, preview descriptor, and drop target descriptor contract before dnd-kit event wiring.
Architecture-hardening C8/C13 were imported as D1/D8-style candidates and marked transferred in the old packet.
validation: No product code changed during S1.

tasks.title: Choose first Builder V2 DnD Worker slice
allowed_files: read-only current Builder V2 model/picker/team slot files
tasks.expected_output: Select D1 alone or D1+D2 if they are one pure contract slice; define allowed files, invariants, validation, rollback, and characterization needs.

evidence: D1 and D2 are one pure TypeScript contract slice: drag payload descriptors and encoded dnd ids must agree before any dnd-kit wiring can safely consume them.
The slice excludes DndContext, sensors, draggable/droppable component wiring, overlay DOM, CSS, routing behavior, mobile work, and teams-list work.
Allowed files are limited to a new Builder V2 DnD contract/id helper module, focused tests, optional type exports, and packet receipts.
validation: Judge-only packet transition; no product code changed yet.

tasks.title: Implement Builder V2 DnD contract and id helpers
tasks.expected_output: A V2-owned drag payload, drag preview descriptor, drop target descriptor, and stable encoded id parser/builder with tests. Preserve current runtime behavior because no DnD wiring is introduced.

evidence: Added `src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.ts` with normalized picker/team drag payloads, preview descriptors, drop target descriptors, V2-prefixed ids, safe parsing, and a runtime payload guard.

Added `src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.test.ts` covering picker/team payloads, source coordinates, empty team surfaces, payload guard behavior, id round trips, colon-safe wheel ids, and malformed id rejection.
Parent review tightened the worker output so team-origin wheel/covenant/awakener payloads carry source coordinates and picker/remove ids are not typed by dragged kind.
validation: npx vitest run src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.test.ts --run -> passed, 7 tests
npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit -> passed

tasks.title: Characterize Builder V2 DnD routing decisions
tasks.expected_output: Pure routing helpers/tests that map drag payload plus parsed drop target into a small DnD action descriptor, covering V1 parity decisions without invoking React/dnd-kit yet.

evidence: Added `BuilderV2DndAction` and `resolveBuilderV2DndAction` to map a typed drag payload plus parsed drop target into future coordinator actions.

Characterized picker awakener/wheel/covenant/posse assignments, slot-level wheel fallback without choosing an index, team wheel/covenant remove-to-picker, team wheel/covenant move/swap intent, same-source no-ops, unsupported combos, and null target behavior.
Captured the explicit current decision that team-awakener-to-picker returns null until a remove-awakener DnD action contract is selected.
validation: npx vitest run src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.test.ts --run -> passed, 18 tests
npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit -> passed
npx eslint src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.ts src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.test.ts -> passed

tasks.title: Wire first functional Builder V2 picker-to-active-team DnD path
tasks.expected_output: Add the first DndContext/useDraggable/useDroppable integration for picker-source drops onto active team slot/wheel/covenant/posse targets, route actions through existing model assignment handlers, and preserve click assignment behavior.

evidence: Added an explicit target model bridge in `BuilderV2ModelTypes.ts`, `useBuilderV2Model.ts`, and `builder-v2-loadout-commands.ts`: `assignAwakenerToSlot`, `assignWheelToSlot`, and `assignCovenantToSlot` route through existing command resolution without relying on React selection timing.
Added `useBuilderV2Dnd.ts` with PointerSensor distance 4, drag-end payload validation, parsed target resolution, and picker-origin action dispatch through the explicit model bridge.
Wrapped desktop/adaptive Builder V2 surfaces in `DndContext`; mobile remains untouched by scope.
Added picker tile draggables for awakeners/wheels/covenants/posses and active team droppables for slot cards, wheel sockets, covenant slots, and posse header target.
Parent review moved posse droppable ownership into `BuilderV2ActiveHeader` to avoid duplicated wrappers in page/adaptive layouts.
validation: npx vitest run src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.test.ts src/features/builder-v2/useBuilderV2Model.test.ts src/features/builder-v2/BuilderV2Page.test.tsx --run -> passed, 93 tests
npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit -> passed
npx eslint touched Builder V2 DnD/model/component files -> passed
Browser smoke on local Vite `#/builder-v2` at 1365x900 and 900x900 -> desktop/adaptive Builder V2 regions rendered

tasks.title: Select long-running team-origin and overlay DnD tranche
allowed_files: read-only current Builder V2 DnD/model/component files
tasks.expected_output: Select a multi-tranche path for D6 team-origin execution followed by D7/D8 overlay visuals, and record D10 accessibility policy.

evidence: D6 was selected first because team-origin drag sources and commands should exist before rendering their ghost previews.
D7 and D8 were selected together because clipping/z-index validation depends on a concrete overlay DOM.
D10 policy selected click-first fallback now and deferred KeyboardSensor until a separate keyboard drag design exists.
validation: Judge-only packet transition.

tasks.title: Implement team-origin Builder V2 DnD execution
tasks.expected_output: Occupied team awakeners/wheels/covenants become drag sources, and team-origin remove/move actions execute through model command boundaries.

evidence: Added team-origin drag ids and enabled team awakener remove-to-picker in the pure DnD resolver.
Added explicit model methods `moveWheel` and `moveCovenant`, plus loadout command resolvers for wheel/covenant remove and move actions.
Updated DnD dispatch so remove/move actions route to model methods instead of no-oping.
Added occupied active-team awakener, wheel, and covenant `useDraggable` sources while preserving the existing button click/select behavior.
validation: npx vitest run src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.test.ts src/features/builder-v2/useBuilderV2Model.test.ts --run -> passed, 59 tests
npx vitest run src/features/builder-v2/BuilderV2Page.test.tsx --run -> passed, 35 tests
npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit -> passed
targeted npx eslint over touched D6 files -> passed
packet checker -> passed

tasks.title: Implement single Builder V2 drag overlay and clipping boundary
allowed_files: focused Builder V2 tests if needed
protected_files: behavior changes beyond overlay state tracking
tasks.expected_output: A single descriptor-driven drag overlay consuming `BuilderV2DragPreviewDescriptor`, with CSS that avoids panel/drawer clipping on desktop/adaptive surfaces.

evidence: Added `BuilderV2DragOverlay.tsx` as a single descriptor-driven `DragOverlay` renderer using only `BuilderV2DragPreviewDescriptor` fields.
Expanded `useBuilderV2Dnd.ts` with active preview tracking on drag start and clearing on drag cancel/end.
Rendered the overlay inside desktop/adaptive `DndContext` in `BuilderV2Page.tsx`.
Added compact overlay CSS in `builder-v2.css` with `data-kind`, square non-wheel previews, wheel `75 / 113` previews, and z-index above adaptive picker layers.
Parent review fixed empty team-source draggable props so empty slot/wheel/covenant buttons do not receive disabled draggable role/aria attributes.
validation: npx vitest run src/features/builder-v2/builder-v2-dnd.test.ts src/features/builder-v2/useBuilderV2Model.test.ts src/features/builder-v2/BuilderV2Page.test.tsx --run -> passed, 94 tests
npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit -> passed
targeted npx eslint over touched DnD/model/component files -> passed
git diff --check -> passed with existing CRLF warning on BuilderV2ActiveTeamChrome.tsx

Browser/Playwright loaded `#/builder-v2` desktop and verified empty slot buttons no longer receive disabled draggable attributes; Playwright drag automation did not successfully exercise dnd-kit pointer assignment.

final_audit.summary: S1 mapped the new Builder V2 DnD goal and imported architecture C8/C13. J1 selected D1+D2 as the first pure contract slice. W1 implemented it. W2 implemented pure routing characterization. W3 implemented first functional picker-to-active-team DnD wiring. J2 selected a long-running D6 then D7/D8 tranche. W4 implemented team-origin DnD execution and W5 implemented the single descriptor-driven overlay. W6 fixed reported slot-swap, remove-to-picker, target correctness, and compact ghost issues. W7 refined ghosts so item drags are art-only and whole-slot drags use a compact full-art slot-card preview. W8 added predicted effective hover shared with final drop routing.
validation: No product code changed during S1.
J1 was a packet-only judge transition.
W1 focused test and typecheck passed.
W2 focused test, typecheck, and targeted eslint passed.
W3 focused tests, typecheck, and targeted eslint passed.
W4 focused tests, page tests, typecheck, targeted eslint, and packet checker passed.
W5 focused tests, typecheck, targeted eslint, diff check, and partial Browser/Playwright smoke passed.
W6 focused tests, typecheck, targeted eslint, and Browser plugin DnD smoke passed.
W7 focused tests, typecheck, targeted eslint, and Browser plugin CSS-rule smoke passed.
W8 focused DnD/page tests, typecheck, targeted eslint, diff check, and packet checker passed.
open_items: M1 and M2 maintenance notes remain queued and are not required for the product DnD tranche.
D11-D12 are out of scope by user.
